zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonathan D. Diffee於1823年12月19日出生在美國田納西州時，他的父親Cornelius Diffee33歲，母親Sarah Cagle24歲。他於大約1843年與Mary Ann Shuffield在美國密西西比州提崇明格提崇明格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1850年住在美國阿肯色州卡羅爾達爾 堂史普。他去世於1862年11月13日在美國阿肯色州享年38歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林波特 達爾瓦利 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonathan D. Diffee于1823年12月19日出生在美国田纳西州时，他的父亲Cornelius Diffee33岁，母亲Sarah Cagle24岁。他于大约1843年与Mary Ann Shuffield在美国密西西比州提崇明格提崇明格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1850年住在美国阿肯色州卡羅爾達爾 堂史普。他去世于1862年11月13日在美国阿肯色州享年38岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林波特 達爾瓦利 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Diffee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Diffey  . Compare   Defee  .

History: William Diffee, from whom present-day American bearers of this name are descended, was born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, and died in 1790 in Randolph County, NC. His surname was also spelled Diffey, while his descendants also bear the surname Defee .

variants.name: Diffey
meanings: English (Dorset): perhaps a nickname from Anglo-Norman French defaé, defieu ‘faithless, disloyal’. Compare Diffee .

variants.name: Defee
meanings: History: This surname is borne by the descendants of William Diffee, born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, died 1790 in Randolph County, NC. The same spelling is recorded in London, England, in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Jonathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathan
meanings: Respelling of   Jonathan  , as if a combination of   John   and   Nathan .

variants.name: Jonathon
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Jonathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathon
meanings: Mainly U.S.: respelled form of   Jonathan  , influenced by   John .

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.
Historical Boundaries - 1833: Carroll, Arkansas Territory, United States; 1836: Carroll, Arkansas, United States

historicEvents.title: The Hermitage is Built
historicEvents.description: The Hermitage located in Nashville, Tennessee was a plantation owned by President Andrew Jackson from 1804 until his death there in 1845. The Hermitage is now a museum.

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Tennessee was known as the Volunteer State because during the Mexican War the government asked Tennessee for 3,000 volunteer soldiers and 30,000 joined.
Arkansas supplied an estimated 50,000 men to the Confederate Army andabout 15,000 to the Union Army.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Shiloh
historicEvents.description: The battle of Shiloh took place on April 6, 1862 and April 7, 1862. Confederate soldiers camp through the woods next to where the Union soldiers were camped at Pittsburg Landing on the Tennessee River. With 23,000 casualties this was the bloodiest battle of the Civil War up to this point.
historicEvents.urlTitle: American Battlefield Trust- Shiloh Pittsburg Landing

en.lifeSummary: When Jonathan D. Diffee was born on 19 December 1823, in Tennessee, United States, his father, Cornelius Diffee, was 33 and his mother, Sarah Cagle, was 24. He married Mary Ann Shuffield about 1843, in Tishomingo, Tishomingo, Mississippi, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, United States in 1850. He died on 13 November 1862, in Arkansas, United States, at the age of 38, and was buried in Valley Cemetery, Point Cedar, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonathan D. Diffee est né le 19 décembre 1823, à Tennessee, États-Unis, son père, Cornelius Diffee, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sarah Cagle, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mary Ann Shuffield environ 1843, à Tishomingo, Tishomingo, Mississippi, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1850. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1862, à Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Valley Cemetery, Point Cedar, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan D. Diffee è nato il il 19 dicembre 1823 nel Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Cornelius Diffee, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Cagle, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mary Ann Shuffield circa 1843, nel Tishomingo, Tishomingo, Mississippi, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850. Morì il 13 novembre 1862, nel Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Valley Cemetery, Point Cedar, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonathan D. Diffeeが1823年12月19日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州で生まれた時，父Cornelius Diffeeは33歳，母Sarah Cagleは24歳であった。約1843年にアメリカ合衆国ミシシッピ州ティショミンゴティショミンゴでMary Ann Shuffieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州カーロルセダー トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1862年11月13日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州で38歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングポイント セダーヴァリー セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonathan D. Diffee(이)가 1823년 12월 19일 미국 테네시 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cornelius Diffee(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Cagle(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1843년 미국 미시시피 주 티쇼밍오 티쇼밍오에서 Mary Ann Shuffield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 아칸소 주 카로 세더르 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1862년 11월 13일 미국 아칸소 주에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 포인트 세더르 발리 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan D. Diffee nasceu em 19 de dezembro de 1823, em Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Cornelius Diffee, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Cagle, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Ann Shuffield aproximadamente 1843, em Tishomingo, Tishomingo, Mississípi, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Cedar Township, Carroll, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1862, em Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Valley Cemetery, Point Cedar, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonathan D. Diffee родился 19 декабря 1823 г. в местности Теннесси, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Cornelius Diffee было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Cagle, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Ann Shuffield около 1843 г. в местности тишоминго, тишоминго, Миссисипи, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности кедар тоуншип, карролл, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Он умер 13 ноября 1862 г. в местности Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности валли кеметири, поинт кедар, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonathan D. Diffee nació el 19 de diciembre de 1823, en Tennessee, Estados Unidos, su papá, Cornelius Diffee, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Sarah Cagle, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mary Ann Shuffield aproximadamente 1843, en Tishomingo, Tishomingo, Misisipi, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1850. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1862, en Arkansas, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Valley Cemetery, Point Cedar, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos.
